query.text:
declare @ma_nt0 varchar(3), @key nvarchar(1000), @f nvarchar(1000), @ItemCount int, @q nvarchar(1000), @partitionTable varchar(10) select top 0 so_ct, ngay_ct, stt_rec, t_tt_nt, t_tien_pb_nt, t_tt_nt as tien_cl_nt, ma_nt, t_tt, t_tien_pb, t_tt as tien_cl, tk, dien_giai into #res from cttt60 select stt_rec, sum(tt_nt) as t_tien_pb_nt, sum(tt) as t_tien_pb into #curpb from cttt30 where stt_rec_pb = @stt_rec group by stt_rec
set @key = '((''' + replace(@ma_dvcs, '''', '''''') + ''' = '''' and ma_dvcs = '@@unit') or (ma_dvcs = ''' + replace(@ma_dvcs, '''', '''''') + '''))' set @key = @key + ' and ma_kh = ''' + replace(@ma_kh, '''', '''''') + '''' set @key = @key + ' and ngay_ct <= ''' + convert(char(8), @ngay_lct, 112) + '''' set @key = @key + ' and (da_pb <> 1 or stt_rec in (select stt_rec from #curpb))'
set @f = 'so_ct, ngay_ct, stt_rec, t_tt_nt, isnull(t_tien_pb_nt, 0) as t_tien_pb_nt, 0 as tien_cl_nt, ma_nt, t_tt, isnull(t_tien_pb, 0) as t_tien_pb, 0 as tien_cl, tk, dien_giai' &FilterInitialize;&CheckRelativeProcess; exec FastBusiness$App$Payment$Finding 'cttt60', '#res', @@refresh, @@pageIndex, @@pageCount, @@lastPage, @@lastCount, @@firstItem, @@lastItem, @key, 'so_ct + stt_rec', @f, '', 'so_ct', 1, @@userID, 1, @ItemCount output, default, @$primeJoin, @$primeFilter
update #res set t_tien_pb_nt = a.t_tien_pb_nt - isnull(b.t_tien_pb_nt, 0), t_tien_pb = a.t_tien_pb - isnull(b.t_tien_pb, 0) from #res a join #curpb b on a.stt_rec = b.stt_rec update #res set tien_cl_nt = t_tt_nt - t_tien_pb_nt, tien_cl = t_tt - t_tien_pb
select @ItemCount select * from #res order by so_ct, stt_rec
